Fresh gets even fresher with the introduction of the fresh foam cruz V2 knit. Featuring a softer, lighter version of our award-winning fresh foam technology, it's comfort youve never felt before. A heathered knit upper is as stylish as it is technical and a suede saddle and deconstructed heel support you no matter where you take the shoe. Its performance with everyday style.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 Running Shoes
description: Celebrate the retro style of the historic Japanese capital in this special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo running shoe from ASICS. This updated version combines advanced components with a striking new design that honors Tokyo's heritage. The GEL-KAYANO 26 shoe allows you to tackle long distances in comfort, thanks to the rearfoot GEL technology that's been redesigned for improved shock absorption upon impact. You'll also benefit from a bouncy feel that stems from the FLYTEFOAM Propel midsole technology. The DUOMAX technology in the midsole offers better support and helps resist excessive overpronation while I.G.S. technology promotes smoother propulsion. Additionally, this style is accented with reflective detailing to improve your visibility when running in low light settings. Get the inspiration and support you need to smash your training goals in the special edition GEL-KAYANO 26 Retro Tokyo performance running shoe from ASICS.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh

reviews.title: ASICS Men's Gel-Kayano 26 doesn't work for me
reviews.text:
I really wanted to love these shoes. I bought the Black ones and they looked great. But trying them on was another thing. Under where my toes connect to my feet there is a ridge or slight raised part that I could really feel. From the ridge to the toe of the shoe my toes seemed to slightly drop making the shoe very uncomfortable for me.
I am really glad that I purchased them through Amazon the free return policy worked for me. I sent the shoes back the next morning. The credit showed up the next morning.

reviews.title: Super shoes— my 6th pair!
reviews.text: I get a new pair every year for birthday and absolutely LOVE them ! Great fit, fine look, they seem to get better every year!!!

reviews.title: Asics Kayano
reviews.text: Asics Kayano's are the best!  Lots of support in the heel, and the Duomax support system is awesome!

reviews.title: Update:Tread showing considerable wear after 70 miles
reviews.text:
Two star: Upper is holding up nicely. Tread is already worn out after only 70 miles. I tried ASICS because reviews talk of superior durability. So far for me upper is good, sole is not.

Update: I reached out to ASICS about the tread life. After sending pictures of tread wear after 70 miles they sent code for replacement shoe from ASICS.com.
That’s pretty awesome customer service in my book.

So far 20 miles on new Kayano fit and finish is great.

Comfort on gel-Kayano 28 is far superior to previous models.

Extra wide is a touch narrow but all in all the first 20 miles is running great.

reviews.title: He’ll only wear ASICS
reviews.text: My husband buys one pair of shoes a year (imagine that!). Of course, he wears them every single day—365 days! ASICS are the best fit and most comfortable for him. They’re fit true to size and are just as advertised. He’s very happy!

I bought one pair and enjoyed walking in them so much that I ordered a second pair in red! A small stylish loop on the heel allows you to easily put them on and take them off.  These sneakers are sooo comfy and have good arch support! Doc approved!

reviews.title: Made in China.  As written on the shoes. . . They are "mediocre" but decent overall.
reviews.text:
These are “mediocre” shoes. You know that because written on them is “Just So So”. Why a company would advertise that their shoes are “Just So So”. . . But. . . These shoes are Made in China and being sold by a Chinese company on Amazon. . . So. . . Perhaps it’s a phrase that’s “lost in translation”.

Though you can’t see it perfectly in the pictures. . . The soles of these shoes are see-through. The sole is hard plastic with a non-stop bottom. The uppers are mesh, so they are “airy”. The footbed has nice arch support, which is a bit unusual for Chinese shoes. Nice padding on the footbed, as well as around the ankle.

I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoe if you don't have flat feet!
reviews.text:
The amount of comfort in this shoe is amazing. It competes easily with $130 overpronation shoes I own aside from no arch support. That's where it failed completely for me. Already tried replacing the insoles with arch support ones but the comfort level wasn't the same sadly. The provided insole is removable but is tacked down with adhesive. Didn't damage the shoes when removing it and with care I was able to put it back in.

So in conclusion, yes these are amazing shoes if you need some overpronation support or if your gait is neutral. In this case I'd highly recommend but sadly it didn't work for me. The shoes look amazing and they feel amazing. The price with the construction of the shoes is an amazing value if you just need some extra support and cushion. I'd consider this shoe to be plush in the midsole and the insole was comfortable but not a lot to make it heavy. If it weren't for my arch I would of ordered another shoe to keep in storage when this one wears out. Great service as usual from Amazon for the free return.

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.

reviews.title: WAY too tight over the foot.  NOT for Diabetics, IMHO!
reviews.text:
I've had these on for about an hour now, so I am sure they are not returnable. That's too bad, because an hour has shown me that they are very uncomfortable. I cannot imagine who would find them wearable. Maybe someone with abnormally narrow feet.

The VERY stretchy material they are made from makes them hard to get on. You MUST use a shoehorn, and even then, it is not easy. They also - unpleasantly - squeeze the foot. After an hour, my toes are getting cold from low circulation! Seriously! Plus, the material does not breathe well, despite it's "perforated" appearance. So my feet are hot and wet.

The laces are just decoration. It's the tight material that holds them on. Plus, the artsy-craftsy arch inset in the instep is an invitation to soiling underneath it, without giving much arch support.
Could these be knock-offs? I assumed the attractive price was because they are a discontinued color. Maybe they are just fakes!.

PS THESE ARE NOT FOR DIABETICS. There is too much restriction of circulation.

I was advised to get "caged" Ultraboosts...the ones that lace normally. (The "cage" is the plastic framework for the laces.) But I liked the color of these.

Big mistake.

title: Xero Shoes Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop, Lightweight & Barefoot Feel
features: A NEW LIGHTWEIGHT road running shoe. Foot-shaped for comfort. Built for speed!
Made in the USA or Imported
GRIP + COMFORT - Flexible to support natural foot motion, and grippy with its tire tread-inspired FeelTrue rubber sole

SHAPED FOR COMFORT, BUILT FOR SPEED - Xero HFS features a lightweight, minimalist build that contours to the shape of your feet. Its spacious toe-box allows you to splay, spread, and relax your toes for superior comfort
XERO DROP SOLE FOR PERFECT POSTURE - The Xero Drop sole offers a non-elevated heel and is low-to-the-ground - this allows for proper posture, balance, and agility for all-round performance

FLEX YOUR FEET, FEEL THE FLOOR - Our tire tread inspired patented 5.5mm FeelTrue sole strikes a balance between just-right protection and feedback - it delivers heel to toe cues to the brain for your best run ever. Allows your feet to bend and flex as nature intended

TRAVEL FRIENDLY, 5000 MILE WARRANTY - Xero HFS’ extra-durable construction is backed by our 5,000 Mile Feel the World Sole Promise. Being ultra-flexible, you can roll ‘em up and put in your pack or pocket for compact storage and easy travel
VEGAN FRIENDLY - Xero Shoes believes in promoting healthy and sustainable lifestyles which is why the HFS is made with zero animal products

reviews.title: Surpassed My Expectations
reviews.text: I feel like now I can write an honest review. I have run for years, 3 5k per week. My go to shoes were NB or Brooks and I loved them. Started seeing Xero Shoes pop up on social media and YouTube. I looked them for months and it seemed like a gimmick product. After some time I said ok I am going to try this shoe and see if they meet their hype. In July of this year I ordered the Prio Cross Trainer model. Now their instructions said adjust over a couple of weeks. Well I said hell no and put them to the test right out of the box. I wore them every chance I got for 30 days straight. I found them comfortable right out of the box and I did not experience any foot or leg discomfort during the break period. I began liking them the more I wore them. At day 31 I put my Brooks Adrenaline runners on. Within 15 mins I was aware of how unbalanced I was in that shoe and while walking around in my home said, I can’t wear these any more I have to put my Xero Shoes on. I swear I referred to them specifically. I have since purchased 2 pairs of the HFS model runners and they are my favorite shoe. I wear them every day. In my old shoes at the end of the day I would change to my slides, I literally have these on until I go to bed. Closest thing to walking barefoot and still having a shoe on.

reviews.title: If you like barefoot shoes give these a try.
reviews.text: I wear a size 11 in most running shoes. Ordered a 10 1/2 in this and it fits great. My feet are on wider side so shorter sizes work for me if the shoe is somewhat wide. Really comfortable and appears well made. I look forward to trying other models. Unlike many other barefoot manufacturers I didn’t see any irregularities in how the shoe was put together.

reviews.title: Comfortable as "bare foot" shoes
reviews.text: I have purchased 2 Xero Men's HFS Running Shoes - Zero Drop and I have been very happy and comfortable wearing them. I've successfully walked and run with them when I visited Philippines for a month and have gotten used to the "bare foot" concept. Although I'm still comfortable wearing my Adidas running shoes, I found myself to be wearing my bare foot shoes more often now as I really find them much lighter, comfortable (for bare foot shoes) and lighter/easier to pack on day or extended trips. I've only been wearing them for the last 2 months or so, so long term I would still need to see how they stand up.

reviews.title: Forms to feet
reviews.text: Really nice lightweight shoes that forms to feet rather than walking with slight incline on heel. One of the best work out shoes there are. Not for running or basket ball- in my opinion, though more for stretching, walking,  calisthenics, boxing or light aerobics.

The shoes adopt stylish color scheme gives you a different visual experience. Breathable and durable. Simple style, all-match colors, can be match any clothing.

title: New Balance Men's FuelCell Rebel Tr V1 Running Shoe
description: Packed with the features you need for performance, the New Balance FuelCell Rebel TR men's running shoe provides the ultimate underfoot experience for athletes of any level. With FuelCell midsole foam and an ABZORB Dynamic Response System for impressive rebound, this shoe has the power to carry you through running, training, and everything in between. It's grounded in performance, but built for stand-out style.
features: 100% Textile
Made in the USA or Imported
Rubber sole
FitWeave Lite
Synthetic upper with no-sew overlays
ABZORB Dynamic Response System provides added rebound
Exposed TPU shank adds support without compromising flexibility
FuelCell foam delivers a propulsive feel to help drive you forward

reviews.title: Rubbed my Achilles raw
reviews.text: Rubbed my heels raw. Husband and I bought these for hiking. We love everything about them except that they rubbed our heels raw. No padding or lining to protect your heels/Achilles and we worry socks. Perhaps ok if you are only going to be walking. However, we hike and hike mountains that are 7,000+ Ft. Great for earthing, building neuro pathways and feedback in feet.

reviews.text: This shoe is a minimalist dream. Inexpensive, lightweight, comfortable, wide toe box, zero drop, did i say comfortable? Now let's see how much of a beating they can take......... Stay tuned.

reviews.title: Knock offs!! Just DON'T DO IT ✅
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:e270e5dd29b72c4c1bdeae3b2a3671e1]] They are dirty with red clay mud. Very very poorly made. For $185 I expect more quality. The material is not properly laid. I am a Nike Shox NZ fanatic. I have over 10 pair and clearly  these are knock offs. The Nike swish is smaller then my pinky finger nail. The shocks are not even so the shoe tilts. I will stick to buying in the store that way I know exactly what I am getting. Ohh let me add they charge you to return items. You have to drive to UPS to drop them off and they charge you a fee. I can not make this up the attached pictures do not lie. Do not buy from this seller. Don't do it!!!! Very disappointed 😞 RETURNING!!!!!

title: Wobe 200 Pcs 1/4 Inch Stainless Steel Spikes with 1 Pcs Spike Wrench, 0.25" Length Track and Cross Country Spikes Shoe Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes
features: Quality Material: Made of high quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design,not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women
Package includes: Package includes 200 pieces spikes with 1 Pcs Spike Wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
Size & Color: Overall length: 0.5 inch / 12.5 mm; shoe spikes pins length: 0.25 inch / 6.5 mm, standard 1/4” length; Thread rod length: 0.2 inch / 5mm.

Easy to Use & Replace Spikes: The package includes a Spike Wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

Provide Great Grip for Sporters: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints,long jump, running.

title: Brooks Women's Ravenna 9 Road Running Shoe
description: Fall in love with the new Addiction 13. The BioMoGo DNA midsole provides adaptive cushioning, while the Extended Progressive Diagonal Rollbar guarantees stability and comfort. The Segmented Crash Pad allows a soft and flowing heel-toe transition. If you add to all this an extra-comfortable upper in perforated mesh for moisture transpiration, you will discover why these shoes are addictive, but without any unpleasant side effects. Features: The BioMoGo DNA midsole offers adaptive cushioning, the Crash Pad segmented along the entire length of the foot ensures smooth transitions, the Omega Flex Grooves improve flexibility, great for running on the road, ideal for those with medium arched feet / flat, ideal for those with moderate pronation, 12 mm thick midsole. Weight 383 gr.
features: Imported
Rubber sole

reviews.title: Love these shoes
reviews.text: Very light weight and breathable. My favorite running shoes, I own several pair.

reviews.title: EXCELLENT SHOES RECOMMENDED BY PHYSICAL THERAPIST
reviews.text: I was recently diagnosed with Osteonecrosis and had to have a right total hip replacement due to collapsed hip socket.  My physical therapist recommended these for excellent support, mostly for my heel and ankle.  She was spot on.  Once the shoes were "broken in" they are wonderfully comfortable.  I did find them a bit tight across the top of my foot but gradually relaxed as I wore them.  I like that the tongues are also laced in.

reviews.title: Brooks is awesome yet again!
reviews.text: Love Brooks! My favorite running shows! They are consistently awesome no matter the model.

reviews.title: LOVE Brooks Tennies!!!
reviews.text: This is my third pair of Brooks and I’ll never buy anything else. They are SUPER comfy and SUPER durable. I have a history of Plantar Fasciitis (as many people who have worked 12-hr hosp shifts), and I’m EXTREMELY picky about my shoes. Brooks have EXCELLENT arch support. I require orthotics in most shoes that I wear, but not Brooks. I had my last pair for over 3 yrs of frequent wear. They are still structurally sound, but showing some cosmetic signs of wear. I bought this new pair for our 3-month trip in Europe. I have worn them for a week, and that is plenty to be assured that they are “broken in”. They are super comfy right out of the box!!

reviews.title: Great shoes for being in your feet. Lost a bit of cushion compared to previous versions.
reviews.text: I love Brooks and I’ve always worn Ravenna’s. I’m an ER nurse and I walk a lot, these are my go to work shoe. I wish there was a wee bit more arch support and I seem to feel they used to have more cushion overall, but an insert will make them perfect.

title: WHITIN Men's Max Cushioned Running Shoes | Superior Comfort, Yet Remaining Stability
features: Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole
Open engineered knit upper offers enhanced breathability and comfort.
Rubberized foam outsole provides long-lasting durability and adequate grip.
Internal heel counter provides lightweight response and lasting durability and support.
Lace-up closure and padded tongue provides locked-in fit and support for neutral runners.
Durable density foam midsole with a lower heel to toe drop provide lightweight and propulsive power.

reviews.title: Buy a Size Larger
reviews.text: This show has a short toe box but with plenty of heel and arch space.  I'm glad that I purchased a 10 instead of a 9.5 .  It is a perfect fit, really supports my knees. Terrific product 😊

reviews.title: Not a running shoe
reviews.text:
Surprising. This is not a road shoe by any stretch of the imagination. I've been switching from heel toe stride to mid foot striker. Not comfortable enough and minimal cushioning
This at best is for walking.
Also tight in the toe box. Kind of surprising. I will not be buying more of these
Also oddly they came in plastic wrap. No box. Cosmetic but just odd

reviews.title: Good stable comfortable shoe
reviews.text: I finally found a show that offers stability comfort and no memory foam! Considering stocking up!

reviews.title: You'll get what you pay for.
reviews.text: Updated: Over the long term, wearing them daily for work...Garbage.

reviews.title: Horrible shoe. Barbie shoes are better quality.
reviews.text: I don't like to write negative reviews but this shoe truly sucks. So cheaply made. Colour was nice though .

title: ASICS Men's GT-2000 9 Running Shoes
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Technology Cushioning System - Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.

FlyteFoam Midsole Technology - Our FlyteFoam technology provides exceptional bounce back and responsiveness no matter the distance, utilizing organic super fibers to help reduce packing out that traditionally happens with softer, low density foams.
DuoMax Support System - A dual density midsole system positioned to enhance support and stability, positioned sport specifically.
Guidance Line Midsole Technology - Vertical flex groove decouples the tooling along the line of progression for enhanced gait efficiency.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology - This Trusstic System Technology integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

reviews.title: Not as good as the old ones!
reviews.text: Shoes fit as advertised, though toebox is slightly narrower than previous GT series. Footbed is comfy, but lacks the support of earlier GT models. These feel like $45 shoes, not $120 shoes. Disappointed in these.

reviews.title: ASICS HAVE ALWAYS HAD THE BEST COMFORT AND SUPPORT
reviews.text: just remember that they run small. a half size larger and extra wide are perfect

reviews.title: Decent sneaker, comfy for walking & ru ning.
reviews.text: If you don't have problem feet, this sneaker provides decent support and fits well. Style is unassuming and easy to coordinate with most understated office wear as well.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: I’m a huge ASICS fan and these shoes are great.

reviews.title: Will buy again
reviews.text: My husband has been wearing these for years. They fit nice every time.

title: Avia Avi Factor Slip On Girls' Sneakers - Lightweight Tennis, Athletic, Running Shoes for Girls - Toddler, Little Kid, and Big Kid Sizes 11 to 6
features: Rubber sole
PERFORMANCE SNEAKERS FOR GIRLS - A sturdy, dependable everyday sneaker that provides ultimate durability for active kids. The lightweight, breathable mesh overlays create comfort and ventilation.

SLIP ON, NO TIE LACES ALTERNATIVE CLOSURE - Gore, bungee, or toggle lace closures with no tying makes an easy, fast on and off option for toddlers, preschoolers, and kids of all ages. The perfect camp, sports, everyday, or back to school shoes! Available in sizes toddler 10 to big kid 6.
COMFORTABLE & DURABLE GIRLS ATHLETIC SHOES - The Avia compression molded EVA midsole and removable EVA sock add supportive cushioning for all-day wear.
COOL TODDLER & GIRLS SNEAKERS - In trendy, versatile colors, these running shoes go with everything in their wardrobes - and they stand out in the crowd!
NON-MARKING TPR SOLEPLATE - Kids will leave their mark on people, not on the ground or gym floor! The thick but light weight rubber sole holds up to everyday wear and play.

reviews.title: Great little athletic shoes
reviews.text: My daughter, age 5, wears a size 13(kid) and has a wide foot. These shoes fit nicely. I like that there isn't any velcro. Velcro never holds up well and everything gets stuck to it. These shoes are closer to the shoes that we'll be buying in the near future once my daughter masters tying laces. Highly recommend these shoes.

reviews.title: Pretty and comfortable but looked worn very quickly
reviews.text: My granddaughter loved these shoes - she loved the colors and the fit -  but they wore out in a matter of a few weeks.

reviews.title: True Size Fit
reviews.text: These girl's tennis shoes are so cute! They're also pretty comfortable. The slip-on feature is easy and the shoes stay on. Traction is good. They are true size fit. And they're very affordable.

reviews.title: Pretty
reviews.text:
They liked the rainbow sneakers. These sneakers were good. She could run in them without a problem.
These shoes are very nice. They were cute for my child. They thought they were comfortable. The fit was fine. They were able to use it for different situations. They were easy to put on and off. The quality seemed fine. They looked good on her. She liked them. The deal was fine. I would recommend them.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: Fits as expected, pretty design and colors.  Comfortable,  well made, good brand.
